Name: Average time for Accepted + Wait across all process variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait and the end of the case

Name: Total time spent in Accepted + Wait when followed by Completed + Resolved
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Minimum time for Accepted + Wait in variants that include Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait and the end of the case

Name: Average duration of Accepted + Wait compared to Accepted + Wait - User
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - User'

Name: Average time from Accepted + In Progress to Accepted + Wait
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Accepted + Wait'

Name: Total time between Accepted + Wait and the subsequent Completed + Resolved
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Minimum time elapsed from Accepted + Wait to Completed + Closed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Average cycle time of cases containing Accepted + Wait before reaching Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Total duration of Accepted + Wait in variants where Completed + In Call appears later in the trace
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Average time for Accepted + Wait when it directly precedes Completed + Resolved versus when it is followed by another Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Time from the start of the case until Accepted + Wait is performed in traces that eventually reach Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Duration of Accepted + Wait in comparison with Accepted + Wait - Implementation
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation'

Name: Elapsed time between Accepted + Wait and the next activity in variants ending with Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average time for Accepted + Wait in cases that do not contain Completed + In Call, contrasted with those that do
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call does not occur

Name: Total time spent in Accepted + Wait across all occurrences immediately preceding Completed + Resolved in high-impact incidents
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Minimum time for Accepted + Wait when occurring after Queued + Awaiting Assignment and before Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Cycle time contribution of Accepted + Wait in the most frequent variant containing Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Time between Accepted + Wait and Completed + Closed in variants that also include Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Average duration of Accepted + Wait when followed by Accepted + In Progress versus when followed directly by Completed + Resolved in traces involving Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Total time from Accepted + Wait to the final resolution (Completed + Closed) in cases where Completed + In Call occurs after Accepted + Wait
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + Closed'
